original_abstract: This dataset supports Sub-Task 1 of the "Advertisement in Retrieval-Augmented Generation" track at Touché 2025. It consists of document segments extracted from the MS MARCO V2.1 collection, retrieved in response to queries sourced from the Webis Generated Native Ads 2024 corpus. The data is designed to facilitate research into how promotional content can be integrated into or identified within RAG-based systems.
humanized_abstract: Here is the dataset for the Sub-Task 1 of the "Advertisement in Retrieval-Augmented Generation" track at Touché 2025. It contains document segments sampled from the MS MARCO V2.1 corpus which are relevant to generated queries from the Webis Generated Native Ads 2024 corpus. The goal is to investigate the positioning of advertisement content in RAG models.
